body_txt: A Sub-Trope of Eerie Pale-Skinned Brunette . (Which is to say, if the character's hair isn't dark or mostly dark, they don't count.) Creepy Loner Girl is the Distaff Counterpart in terms of appearance, but not necessarily in personality. See Enemy Mime , Face Framed in Shadow , Goth , Undeathly Pallor ; Tall, Dark, and Snarky ; Excessive Evil Eyeshadow , Stringy-Haired Ghost Girl , But Not Too White , and Ghostly Gape . Also see Looks Like Orlok and Lorre Lookalike . Not to be confused with that other Cesare , who looked like Jesus instead.
